reasoning: Bearish: (1) Jun 23 gap-down crash -3.29%, (2) LH+LL structure break, (3) Price broke ST dealing range, (4) NDX SMT bearish vs GSPC (-3.29% vs -1.44%), (5) Both indices failed ATH at Jun 22.
